body.title: Failure detection + executive function (D276)
body.result: goal_fail_active() tool: finds active GOAL, increments failure_count, cortex.search for alternatives (persistence hunting). At 3 failures: channel escalation. Registered as zero-arg tool. PROC_GOAL_STUCK habit seeded: fires on stuck/error/not-found, calls goal_fail_active. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Implement failure detection for goal nodes: detect when current_strategy stalls (N turns without progress toward success_condition), fire BRANCHIF, generate alternative strategies via deeper search — actively look for levers, not just next habit. Executive function IS persistence hunting: keep searching for what fits until something does. Connects to D276. Needs goal node active in TWM to monitor.
